title: mariscus paradoxus
intro: Mariscus paradoxus, also known as the Java fern, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is often used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Mariscus paradoxus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried or processed into a tea, and its medicinal properties can also be extracted through infusion or decoction.
